generated_oml:
instance HeatingBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed powered by a MOSFET/optocoupler load control board and controlled by the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12 V or 24 V DC fan driven through MOSFETs and controlled by the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high‑precision 1‑Wire temperature sensor mounted inside the box (inner temperature read‑out 1)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TempDataTransmittedInternal1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high‑precision 1‑Wire temperature sensor mounted inside the box (inner temperature read‑out 2)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TempDataTransmittedInternal2
]

instance RoomTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high‑precision 1‑Wire temperature sensor mounted in the room."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TempDataTransmittedRoom
]

instance TempDataTransmittedInternal1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance TempDataTransmittedInternal2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance TempDataTransmittedRoom : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTempSensor
]

instance HeatbedStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatingBedActuator
]

instance FanStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FanActuator
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped internal temperature recordings from InternalTempSensor1."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TempDataTransmittedInternal1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped internal temperature recordings from InternalTempSensor2."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TempDataTransmittedInternal2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped room temperature recordings from RoomTempSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TempDataTransmittedRoom
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance HeatbedStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current status of the heatbed (on/off, power level)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance FanStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current status of the fan (on/off, speed)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FanStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBrokerEnabler
]

instance TemperatureModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic temperature model A with free parameters experimentally calibrated using sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance TemperatureModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic temperature model B with free parameters experimentally calibrated using sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Local RabbitMQ AMQP broker hosting the Raspberry Pi and providing message routing between physical and virtual components."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService, SimulationServiceA, SimulationServiceB, CalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SciPyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python SciPy optimisation library used for non‑linear least squares calibration of Dynamic Temperature Models."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time temperature monitoring of the incubator via RabbitMQ message broker."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureInsight
]

instance SimulationServiceA : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation of temperature using TemperatureModelA."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelATemperatureForecastInsight
]

instance SimulationServiceB : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation of temperature using TemperatureModelB."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelBTemperatureForecastInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters via non‑linear least squares using SciPy."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationParametersInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring for temperature thresholds and safety violation alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlertInsight, SuggestCorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection of system components based on sensor and actuator status data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight, TroubleshootHardwareAction
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of current temperature readings from internal and room sensors."
]

instance ModelATemperatureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature trend predictions from Dynamic Temperature Model A."
]

instance ModelBTemperatureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature trend predictions from Dynamic Temperature Model B."
]

instance CalibrationParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters verified against experimental sensor data."
]

instance SafetyViolationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation alert triggered when temperature thresholds are exceeded."
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that a fault has been detected in system components based on sensor and actuator status data."
]

instance SuggestCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested corrective action to adjust temperature setpoints for safety compliance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSetpointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed setpoint based on model forecasts and safety monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TroubleshootHardwareAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Troubleshooting guidance for hardware faults detected by fault detection service."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT consumes control commands from RabbitMQ and forwards them to the Raspberry Pi controller, which actuates the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs; the DT also publishes actuator state notifications back to the broker."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in near real‑time, with sensor readings and control commands exchanged over RabbitMQ, allowing millisecond‑to‑second level synchronization between PT and DT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the physical incubator, the Raspberry Pi controller, the low‑level driver, the RabbitMQ broker, the virtual simulation models, and the data calibration and monitoring services, all orchestrated through message queue communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is in the operational stage, modeling the manufactured incubator for run‑time monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is assessed by comparing simulated temperature trajectories with experimental data, using residual minimisation via least squares, and validating key assumptions such as uniform temperature distribution and negligible wall heat accumulation; calibration reduces prediction error significantly."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The PT and DT communicate over the AMQP protocol via a local RabbitMQ broker hosted on the Raspberry Pi, with messages exchanged between the low‑level driver, controller, and the virtual models."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed locally on the Raspberry Pi 4, running the RabbitMQ broker and the virtual model processes, all hosted within an open‑source repository and accessible via Wi‑Fi."
]
